case_title: APOYO FINANCIERO INC. VS. LUCIA DEL ROSARIO LOPEZ VARGAS

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY VERONICA ROSALES, ASSISTANT MANAGER. DEFENDANT LUCIA DEL ROSARIO LOPEZ VARGAS IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. CASE IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ERIC GROVER; CLERK: S. KANE. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER OF DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ VARGAS, LUCIA DEL ROSARIO
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY APOYO FINANCIERO INC. AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ VARGAS, LUCIA DEL ROSARIO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-20-2023 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SC-109 AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR [VERONICA ROSALES REQUESTING TO APPEAR ON BEHALF OF PLAINTIFF] FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC.
